purpose: Canonical machine-stable reason code registry for semantic artifact verdict execution

GENESIS_SEAL_PRESENT.meaning: the canonical genesis seal object was observed at the declared path

GENESIS_SEAL_ABSENT.meaning: the canonical genesis seal object was not observed at the declared path

AUTHORITY_LEDGER_PRESENT.meaning: the authoritative ledger object was observed at the declared path

AUTHORITY_LEDGER_ABSENT.meaning: the authoritative ledger object was not observed at the declared path

SUBJECT_COMMIT_MATCHED.meaning: the evaluated repository head matched the subject commit declared by the artifact

SUBJECT_COMMIT_MISMATCH.meaning: the evaluated repository head did not match the subject commit declared by the artifact

DECLARED_EVIDENCE_PRESENT.meaning: all declared mandatory evidence files required for execution were present

DECLARED_EVIDENCE_MISSING.meaning: one or more declared mandatory evidence files required for execution were missing

SEMANTIC_READINESS_UNSATISFIED.meaning: the artifact claim was executable and evaluated, but readiness conditions were not satisfied

SEMANTIC_VALIDATION_SUCCEEDED.meaning: the artifact claim was executable and all required semantic checks succeeded

SUBJECT_ABSENT_NOT_EXECUTABLE.meaning: execution could not begin because the claimed subject was absent

EXECUTION_PREREQUISITE_MISSING.meaning: execution could not begin because an indispensable prerequisite was absent

rules: reason code selection must be deterministic
reason code ordering must be stable across implementations
implementations must emit only codes defined in this registry
terminal reason codes must only appear with verdict NOT_EXECUTABLE
failure reason codes must not be used as a substitute for terminal non-executability
